text:
The post-NFL career of Peyton Manning has forayed into a successful tenure in media.

But even for someone as accomplished as Manning, his latest venture is a prominent next step.

Manning is set to join NBCГўВҖВҷs Mike Tirico in Paris this summer to help anchor the networkГўВҖВҷs coverage of the Olympic opening ceremony. Manning wonГўВҖВҷt be the only prominent sidekick to Tirico on the broadcast. NBC also will have Grammy Award-winning singer Kelly Clarkson as part of the networkГўВҖВҷs television coverage of the ceremony. The trio announced the news onThe Tonight Show Starring Jimmy FallonГӮВ on Tuesday night.

Manning also spoke withAndrew Marchand ofThe AthleticГӮВ about how the arrangement came about, mentioning that Tirico first began courting him for the role last May at the Kentucky Derby.

ГўВҖВңI kind of argued with him as to why he and NBC thought I was worthy,ГўВҖВқ Manning told Marchand. ГўВҖВңHe said they were bringing in Kelly Clarkson to kind of give the perspective of the fan and wanted me to share the perspective of what these athletes are thinking about it.ГўВҖВқ

As for Tirico, he was thrilled he was able to convince both Manning and Clarkson to join the telecast.

ГўВҖВңI couldnГўВҖВҷt be more thrilled that they both said yes,ГўВҖВқ Tirico told Marchand.

Manning has been a staple during ESPNГўВҖВҷsMonday Night FootballГӮВ telecasts over the past couple seasons, as he hosts an alternateГӮManningCastbroadcastГӮВ with brother Eli. Manning also leadsГӮOmaha Productions, a company that has a close partnership with ESPN.

Even in the context of ManningГўВҖВҷs accomplished media career, this summerГўВҖВҷs Olympics coverage might be ManningГўВҖВҷs most significant role yet.

The opening ceremony of the Paris Olympics is scheduled for July 26.

Mike McDaniel is a staff writer on the Breaking and Trending News team at Sports Illustrated, where he has worked since January 2022. His work has been featured at InsideTheACC.com, SB Nation, FanSided and more. McDaniel hosts the Hokie Hangover Podcast, covering Virginia Tech athletics, as well as Basketball Conference: The ACC Football Podcast. Outside of work, he is a husband and father, and an avid golfer.

title: Peyton Manning to Host NBCГўВҖВҷs Paris Olympics Opening Ceremony Broadcast
description: This summer will mark ManningГўВҖВҷs biggest opportunity yet in sports media.
